title: Adventurous Umami Dense Chicken Stir-fry
description: An adventurous Filipino dish featuring dense chicken with umami flavors, perfect for a quick dinner or snack.

ingredients.name: 1 tbsp low-sodium oyster sauce
ingredients.notes: for a salty depth of taste

ingredients.name: 1 cup low-sodium chicken broth
ingredients.amount: low sodium or use water as a substitute

ingredients.name: 1 cup baby spinach
ingredients.notes: to complete the dish with freshness

instructions: Preheat your oven to 450°F (230°C). Pat dry chicken slices.
Mix together soy sauce, oyster sauce, and a pinch of salt in a small bowl. Brush evenly over chicken.
Arrange chicken on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake for about 18-20 minutes until golden brown and cooked through.
While the chicken is baking, sauté chopped onion and minced garlic in a non-stick skillet over medium heat for 3-4 minutes or until softened.
Add sliced bell peppers to the skillet with onions and garlic. Cook for another minute, then stir in low-sodium broth, salt, and pepper to taste.
Stir in baby spinach and cook until just wilted, about a minute. Adjust seasoning if needed.
Combine cooked chicken pieces with the vegetable mixture. Serve immediately while warm.
